selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel controller follow-on on the action board after the transport packet.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the archive-manifest parent into controller-facing fences for archive-local authority-label discipline, legacy-demotion non-veto handling, shorthand-name identity caution, packaging and deterministic-claim caution, and comparison-ledger usefulness without active-authority escalation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest stable cross-family follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche after this refined-fuel packet.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the archive-manifest authority boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_MANIFEST_CANON_LABELS_STAY_SOURCE_LOCAL_AND_NONAUTHORIZING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's dominant authority-label caution without letting archive labels harden into canon grants.

candidate_items.name: LEGACY_DEMOTION_IS_HISTORICAL_CLASSIFICATION_NOT_A_ZERO_REUSE_VERDICT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's rule that archive-time demotion does not erase later reusable fence value.

candidate_items.name: NONCANON_NOTES_AND_SHORTHAND_NAMES_ARE_FAMILY_SIGNALS_NOT_MACHINE_IDENTITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's notes-quarantine and shorthand-name boundary into a controller-usable identity fence.

candidate_items.name: AUTOMATION_SAFE_AND_DETERMINISTIC_CLAIMS_STAY_ARCHIVE_LOCAL_PACKAGING_ASSERTIONS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's packaging-confidence close without letting it become an active runtime warranty.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_MANIFEST_REMAINS_USEFUL_AS_COMPARISON_LEDGER_NOT_FULL_ROOT_COMPLETENESS_OR_ACTIVE_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the manifest useful as historical placement evidence while blocking completeness, registry, and authority inflation.

quarantined_items.name: ARCHIVE_MANIFEST_AS_ACTIVE_CANON_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY_OR_MUTATION_PERMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it records strong source-local labels while current intake discipline refuses to let those labels self-authenticate.

quarantined_items.name: ARCHIVE_MANIFEST_AS_MACHINE_EXACT_FULL_ROOT_REGISTRY_AND_DETERMINISTIC_EXECUTION_WARRANTY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent remains a compact archive snapshot with partial scope and naming normalization rather than a strict live registry.

notes: This batch was produced as the thirtieth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
